description: Present your top of the line cosmetic products with this vivid Black Friday email template. This elegant template allows you to easily showcase all of your on-sale items in a non-cluttered layout. Reel customers in through bold CTAs and a helpful discount code near the bottom of the email.

designer.description: I am a graphic and web designer, as well as UX designer. I am a font fetishist, and I am obsessed with every kind of human-machine interaction. I love Italian trash music, good food and crowded metropolis.
